raw.message: Keep calm and Capy on. 🦦 Dive into the world's chillest Roguelike adventure!

hook.summary: A person with a distorted face filter acts as a 'noob' player holding a capybara plush.
hook.visual_action: A man with a large-mouth filter dances while holding a capybara plush on his shoulders.
hook.text_overlay: POV: Noobs who get their first Capybara

scene_flow: Showcases a 'noob' player with a silly face filter and basic capybara.
Transitions to a 'pro' player using a promo code for rewards.
Displays the 'pro' player with cool effects and sunglasses.
Ends with a call-to-action screen featuring the game logo and characters.
on_screen_text: POV: Noobs who get their first Capybara
POV: You used code LUCKY2025 and got free rewards to level your Capybara
audience_proxy: Young casual gamers and Gen Z users who enjoy meme-driven content and capybaras.
